text: We cannot agree to these terms unless you include a {{c1::termination clause}} for convenience.
explanation: A termination clause is a contract provision that defines the conditions under which the agreement can be ended. For convenience means it can be terminated without needing a specific cause or breach.
usage:
Pattern: termination clause / terminate for convenience
  • The contract contains a 30-day termination clause.
  • Either party may terminate the agreement for convenience with written notice.
spanish: No podemos aceptar estos términos a menos que incluya una cláusula de rescisión por conveniencia.

text: During the review, he negotiated: "Based on the {{c1::market rate}} and my contributions, I'd like to adjust my {{c2::compensation package}} to include remote-work fringe benefits."
explanation: Market rate is the standard salary for a role. **Compensation package** includes base salary, bonuses, and benefits. **Fringe benefits** are extra benefits (like gym memberships or health insurance).
usage:
Pattern: negotiate a compensation package based on market rate / include fringe benefits
  • Our company offers an attractive compensation package with great fringe benefits.
  • The offer is below the current market rate for senior developers.
spanish: Durante la revisión, negoció: "Basándome en la tarifa del mercado y mis contribuciones, me gustaría ajustar mi paquete de compensación para incluir beneficios adicionales de trabajo remoto".
